sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Click blue at cols 28-29
predict(expect_change=True, note='Click blue at cols 28-29')
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 29}])

print("Result:", last_action_result)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\n=== KEY OBJECTS ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if n['color'] in ('W', 'b', 'N', 'c', 'Y', 'p') and n['pixels'] < 500:
        print(f"  {n['color']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)} pixels={n['pixels']}")

if last_action_result.get('level_completed') or last_action_result.get('done'):
    print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
elif last_action_result.get('game_over'):
    print("Game over")
else:
    print("Level active")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
